name: Portuguese Fried New Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1.5 pounds new potatoes, peeled and sliced into 1/4-inch rounds
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy skillet, melt the butter over the olive oil over moderate heat.
2. When the foam subsides, add the potatoes to the skillet.
3. Turn the potatoes frequently until they are tender and golden brown, taking about 15 minutes total.
4. Season with salt and a few grindings of freshly ground black pepper.
5. Transfer the potatoes to a heated platter and serve immediately, sprinkled with chopped parsley.
